name: Chili Salsa Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Salsa; prepared med or hot
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the beef.
2. Cut the beef into 1 1/4-inch pieces.
3. Heat oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat until hot.
4. Add half of the beef to the pot and brown evenly, stirring occasionally.
5. Pour off any drippings.
6. Stir salsa, sugar, soy sauce, and garlic into the beef.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil.
8. Reduce heat to low and cover tightly.
9. Simmer for 1 hour.
10. Remove the lid and continue cooking, uncovered, for an additional 30 minutes or until the beef is tender.
11. Stir in chopped cilantro and lime juice.
12. Spoon the beef mixture over rice.
13. Garnish with cilantro sprigs and lime quarters if desired.
